guardian.verify.title: Guardian Consent Verification
guardian.verify.subtitle: Enter the OTP you received to verify consent for the student.
guardian.verify.placeholders.tokenFull: Paste the full consent token here (if the URL token is missing/truncated)
guardian.verify.status.tokenMissing: Token missing or incomplete ❌ (paste token below)
guardian.verify.messages.tokenIncomplete: Token looks missing or incomplete. Please paste the full token (it may have been truncated in the URL).
guardian.verify.messages.successCloseTab: Consent verified successfully. You may now close this tab.
guardian.verify.success.closeWindow: You can safely close this tab/window now.
guardian.verify.error.tipLongLink: Tip: If you copied a long link, the token might be truncated. Paste the full token above and try again.
pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: CareerPlatform offers a deterministic, explainable assessment with a Free report and an upgraded Premium report.
pricing.free.title: Free
pricing.free.subtitle: Great for first-time exploration
pricing.premium.title: Premium
pricing.premium.subtitle: Deeper analytics + explainability
pricing.note.noPaymentWiring: No backend payment wiring in this step — CTA routes to existing flows.
pricing.note.nextStep: Next step (later): connect Premium CTA to real checkout/payment and route to premium report pages.
pricing.whatYouGet.title: What you get
pricing.whatYouGet.deterministic.title: Deterministic
pricing.whatYouGet.deterministic.desc: Recommendations come from controlled mappings and scoring — not random outputs.
pricing.whatYouGet.explainable.title: Explainable
pricing.whatYouGet.explainable.desc: Premium focuses on “why” — key skills and cluster drivers.
pricing.whatYouGet.complianceFirst.title: Compliance-first
pricing.whatYouGet.complianceFirst.desc: Guardian consent gating remains enforced for minors in protected student routes.
pricing.whatYouGet.incrementalBuild.desc: This page is UI-only and safe to merge without backend changes.

student.assessmentIntro.body1: This assessment helps generate deterministic and explainable career recommendations based on your responses.

student.assessmentIntro.note: Note: Start creates a real assessment id via backend. Resume uses the last saved snapshot.

student.assessmentSubmit.errors.invalidA: Invalid answer value for question_id={{questionId}}. Please go back and reselect the option.

home.hero.eyebrow: Now live · India's first AQ-based career assessment
home.hero.headline: Discover the career you were built for
home.hero.subtitle: MapYourCareer uses 25 Associated Qualities to build your unique talent fingerprint — then maps it to 343 careers across 16 industry clusters. Science-backed. Counsellor-verified.
home.howItWorks.title: How it works
home.howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps. Twenty minutes. A lifetime of clarity.
home.howItWorks.step1.title: Take the assessment
home.howItWorks.step1.desc: 75 carefully crafted questions measuring your 25 Associated Qualities — curiosity, analytical thinking, empathy, grit, and more.
home.howItWorks.step2.title: Get your AQ profile
home.howItWorks.step2.desc: Your unique talent fingerprint across 25 dimensions. Explainable, science-backed, and never just a label or score.
home.howItWorks.step3.title: Discover your careers
home.howItWorks.step3.desc: Your profile is matched to 343 careers across 16 clusters. See what fits, what gaps exist, and what to do next.
home.features.title: Built differently
home.features.subtitle: Not a quiz. Not a personality type. A real assessment engine.
home.features.aq.title: 25 Associated Qualities
home.features.aq.desc: From curiosity and analytical decomposition to stress tolerance and integrity — we measure what drives career success.
home.features.careers.title: 343 careers, 16 clusters
home.features.careers.desc: Agriculture to STEM, Health Science to Creative Arts — every major Indian and global career path is mapped.
home.features.explainable.title: Explainable results
home.features.explainable.desc: Every recommendation comes with a clear reason. No black box. Your counsellor can read and act on it.
home.features.multilingual.title: Multilingual
home.features.multilingual.desc: Questions available in English and Kannada. More languages coming soon.
home.features.counsellor.title: Counsellor tools
home.features.counsellor.desc: Forward and reverse career engines let counsellors run live gap analysis during student sessions.
home.features.safe.title: Safe for minors
home.features.safe.desc: Guardian consent flow, privacy-first design, and student-safe output projections built in from day one.
home.clusters.title: 16 career clusters covered
home.clusters.subtitle: Every major industry — from your first job to your calling.
home.quotes.title: What counsellors say
home.quotes.1.text: Finally a tool that gives me something concrete to discuss with the student, not just 'you are an INTJ'.
home.quotes.1.name: Priya Nair
home.quotes.2.text: The gap analysis between a student's current profile and their dream career is a game changer for sessions.
home.quotes.2.name: Rajesh Menon
home.quotes.3.text: Our students in rural schools now get the same quality of career guidance as those in metro schools.
home.quotes.3.name: Anita Sharma
home.finalCta.title: Ready to map your career?
home.finalCta.subtitle: Free to start. Takes 20 minutes. Results that actually mean something.
